modules.title: Module 1: Foundations of Grammar
modules.description: Build a clean base in word classes, sentence architecture, and noun phrases before moving into more advanced control.
modules.portfolioTask: Write a 150-word self-introduction and label nouns, verbs, articles, and sentence types.

lessons.title: Parts of Speech
lessons.focus: Identify the job each word does inside a sentence.

lessons.title: Sentence Structure
lessons.focus: Build complete sentences with subjects, verbs, and clear complements.

lessons.title: Articles, Determiners, and Nouns
lessons.focus: Use a, an, the, some, and zero article correctly.

modules.title: Module 2: Tenses and Time
modules.description: Learn how English grammar maps routine, action-in-progress, experience, finished time, future reference, and modal meaning.
modules.portfolioTask: Write a three-part narrative using present, past, and future meaning accurately.

lessons.title: Present Simple and Present Continuous
lessons.focus: Choose between routine meaning and action happening around now.

lessons.title: Past Simple and Present Perfect
lessons.focus: Separate finished past time from present relevance.

lessons.title: Future Forms and Future Time Reference
lessons.focus: Choose the right future form for plans, predictions, schedules, and completion.

lessons.title: Modals in Depth
lessons.focus: Express advice, obligation, permission, deduction, ability, and probability precisely.

modules.title: Module 3: Sentence Accuracy
modules.description: Strengthen agreement, pronoun reference, auxiliary use, pattern control, and active-passive choices.
modules.portfolioTask: Edit an old paragraph only for sentence-level accuracy and annotate each correction.

lessons.title: Subject-Verb Agreement
lessons.focus: Match the verb to the true head of the subject.

lessons.title: Pronouns, Questions, and Negatives
lessons.focus: Maintain clear reference and accurate auxiliary structure.

lessons.title: Prepositions and Modifiers
lessons.focus: Choose natural word partnerships and place modifiers carefully.

lessons.title: Active and Passive Voice
lessons.focus: Choose whether the doer or the result deserves the spotlight.

modules.title: Module 4: Complex Grammar
modules.description: Use clauses, relative structures, conditionals, reported speech, and verb patterns to communicate more complex relationships.
modules.portfolioTask: Write a multi-paragraph response using at least one relative clause, one conditional, one reported statement, and one verb-pattern contrast.

lessons.title: Clauses, Conjunctions, and Relative Clauses
lessons.focus: Connect ideas smoothly and add detail without repetition.

lessons.title: Conditionals, Wishes, and Hypothetical Meaning
lessons.focus: Express real possibilities, imagined situations, and regrets.

lessons.title: Reported Speech and Reporting Verbs
lessons.focus: Report statements, questions, and requests accurately.

lessons.title: Gerunds, Infinitives, and Verb Patterns
lessons.focus: Control what form follows the verb and how meaning changes with that choice.

modules.title: Module 5: Style and Editing
modules.description: Turn grammatical accuracy into polished writing through punctuation, balance, comparison, and concise style.
modules.portfolioTask: Revise a formal paragraph for punctuation, parallelism, and concise tone.

lessons.title: Punctuation for Clarity
lessons.focus: Use commas, semicolons, colons, and apostrophes with purpose.

lessons.title: Parallelism and Comparison
lessons.focus: Keep similar ideas in matching grammatical form.

lessons.title: Concision and Formal Tone
lessons.focus: Write with precision without sounding abrupt or repetitive.

modules.title: Module 6: Mastery and Review
modules.description: Turn all of the course content into active control through correction, transformation, and review strategy.
modules.portfolioTask: Complete a mixed review pack and write a reflection on your most persistent grammar errors.

lessons.title: Error Correction Drills
lessons.focus: Spot grammar errors quickly and explain why they are wrong.

lessons.title: Transformations and Cloze Practice
lessons.focus: Rephrase meaning accurately and complete grammar-based gaps.

lessons.title: Final Review and Study Strategy
lessons.focus: Turn the curriculum into a sustainable long-term review system.
